case_title: INGRID JULIET D. VALERIO VS. DELAUN PETERSEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VALERIO, INGRID JULIET D. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALERIO, INGRID JULIET D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, ALTHOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT PREVIOUSLY FAILED TO FULLY COMPLY WITH THE APPLICABLE CC&R'S FOR THE CONDOMINIUM, THE COURT DOES NOT FIND A BASIS FOR AN AWARD OF MONEY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VALERIO, INGRID JULIET D. AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSEN, DELAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
